summary: Stellar audience recording of a rare Spring ’86 show with excellent sound quality
review: Both reviewers describe this tape as an outstanding audience source, calling it “absolutely stellar” and the best‑sounding version available. While they don’t name specific songs, they praise the performance as a one‑of‑a‑kind Spring ’86 East Coast concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive 4‑star reviews highlight excellent audience recording quality and an exceptional show, leading to a solid rating just above the average 4‑star level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as ‘absolutely stellar’ and the best‑sounding audience source among available tapes; clear, well‑balanced capture despite being a crowd recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the concert is a rare Spring ’86 East Coast performance and a ‘one‑of‑a‑kind’ show, but provide no detailed song commentary.
